meaning: n.英国教堂之晨祷,天主教之子夜或黎明之祈祷
examples: After matins (morning prayers), the monks assemble in the upstairs refectory for a simple breakfast of tea, bread, and olives.
As the gap of teeth of internal matins gears with small tooth number difference is small, several teeth will mate simultaneously after the teeth are deformed by load.
The chant of the Sybil is performed at matins on the night of 24 December in churches throughout Majorca.
